description.value: Through study and meditation, you've found a powerful link to the great gifts your ancestors have prepared for you. Through your connection with the ancestral wellspring, you have access to the combined wisdom of thousands of generations. From their place between the stars, they can guide your actions and tell you things about the world around you that you'd never learn on your own. You are permanently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] and can use that extra action only to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge].
